statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); git_branch=$(cd "$dir" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo ''); [ -n "$remaining" ] && echo -n "[$remaining%] "; echo -n "$dir"; [ -n "$git_branch" ] && echo -n " [$git_branch]"; echo
